channel.title: ゥカジ
channel.copyright: ©2017 themilletgrainfromouterspace - lucaji. Except where otherwise stated, all the inner contents, images and texts are intellectual property of themilletgrainfromouterspace.

item.title: Back To The Future Time Machine
item.description:
A full working replica of the time machine circuits from the Back To The Future blockbuster. Apart from actual time travel, it acts as a talking alarm clock.

Video

If you have already requested by permission and you were given the password, you can watch some video footage about the Back To The Future alarm clock project then follow this link to the video.

Last updated: April 2017.

item.title: DirettaInizione
item.description:
Audio preamplifier for dynamic microphones. Performs a FET input stage with high linearity and large bandwidth. With gain control.

FET Input stage

This little AC powered preamplifiers has an input stage configuration with a single FET transistor, very linear for its simplicity giving the warm tone due to the voltage controlled feedback just like a vacuum tube.

Audio Sample

If you want to listen to a recording made with Diretta Iniezione, follow this vimeo link.

item.title: Antoine
item.description:
Based on the novel “The Little Prince” from Antoine de Saint Exupery, is an e-book like with translations in four different languages. Includes a shoot-em-all game with original music.

Antoine Video Footage

If you have already requested by permission and you were given the password, you can watch some video footage about Antoine App project then follow this link to the video.

Last updated: April 2017.

item.title: StartRecApp
item.description:
A multicamera remote controlling iOS App. Synced recording and time lapse support. Manual camera controls and touch parameters. Background file transfer, audio and video chat.

Video Footage on StartRecApp

If you have already requested by permission and you were given the password, you can watch some video footage about Start Rec App then follow these links:

  1. Watch the Live Session Video.
  2. Watch the Promo Video.
  3. Watch the Touch Camera Controls Video.

What is Start Rec for?

Gather many iPhones and iPads running START REC in a local wi-fi network, decide one ADMIN role and set all the remaining to be POSERs before checking-in and enter into a camera session. Now each time the session admin takes a photograph, it will be taken by all connected posers.

Use the VOCAL CHAT to communicate with people in session.

TOUCH MANUAL CAMERA CONTROLS

Activate the Touchy feature and when using the Camera, you can change focus and exposure by sliding your finger across the display.

SYNCHRONIZATION AND TIMELAPSE

SYNCHRONISITY allows you to time-bind the devices. Shooting a photo at the very exact moment on every devices (always BEWARE about where the cameras are pointing at!). Synchronisity adds functionalities that could expose your privacy if misused.

  1. Can take timed photographs and time lapse.
  2. Can record audio and video.
  3. Media file consolidation in background.

What is StartRec up to?

The project is still active and new things are on the way. Stay tuned.

Last updated April 2017

THE SOFTWARE IS PROVIDED “AS IS”, WITHOUT WARRANTY OF ANY KIND, EXPRESS OR IMPLIED, INCLUDING BUT NOT LIMITED TO THE WARRANTIES OF MERCHANTABILITY, FITNESS FOR A PARTICULAR PURPOSE AND NONINFRINGEMENT. item.title: Get in touch
item.description:
You can use the provided links to contact themilletgrainfromouterspace so, please help yourself. On my side, I thank you for visiting my pages. Cheers.

The facebook page Randomart is a group of friends wanting to share some ideas. Feel free to visit it.
